Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts To Provide Further Responses And Documents To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents (Set One); And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF RANDY MISTROT'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES AND DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE); AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Adriana A. Abreu, Esq. of The Cardoza Law Offices 925/274-2900 for pltf & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); David A. Delbon, Deputy City Atty 554-3962 for deft & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court indicated that plaintiff is entitled to some discovery with regard to contents of employment file with a protective order. Court ordered either disciplinary documents re fights between Mr. Oha and members of the public or any complaints from members of the public re Mr. Oha & similar types of situations be turned over with a protective order. Parties to come up with a stipulated protective order. If parties do not agree, each may provide their own proposed order for the Court to determine. No sanctions ordered. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
